title: Kirov、Kirov Oblast — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Kirov、Kirov Oblast的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Kirov是Kirov Oblast的一個城市，人口約470,000。A historic city on the Vyatka River, known for its traditional Dymkovo toys, the Uspensky Monastery, and a rich craft heritage.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
